title: The DC mode of a constant two-point signal is twice the constant

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For a constant two-point signal (u,u), the DC Fourier mode equals 2u.
assumptions: the two-point DC mode is u0 + u1
informal.expected_conclusion: The DC mode equals twice the constant value.

declarations.name: dft2DC
declarations.statement: def dft2DC (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := u0 + u1

declarations.name: dft2DC_const
declarations.statement: theorem dft2DC_const (u : Real) : dft2DC u u = 2 * u

tasks.input: Translate the DC mode of a constant two-point signal into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem dft2DC_const (u : Real) : dft2DC u u = 2 * u

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the DC mode and simplifying.
